hub_hero_subtitle: Tap it, light it, let it tick.
hub_hero_substatement: Sounds, visuals, clocks, timers, stickers, extensions — an interactive studio that builds things with a beat you can tap.
hub_works_lede: Everything in motion at the studio — tap, tweak, play.
hub_works_item_spv2_desc: A Chrome extension that listens to YouTube and draws what it hears. Live on the Web Store.
hub_works_item_galton_timer_desc: A Galton-board timer where balls fall into a bell curve. Watch time pile up as physics.
hub_works_item_wall_clock_desc: A browser that becomes a wall clock. Burn-in shift and circadian color, built in from day one.
hub_works_item_galton_tempo_desc: A rhythm generator that fires grains on the beat and lets gravity decide the swing.
hub_works_item_vogel_timer_desc: Time does not tick down, it fills up. A golden-angle spiral blooms while the clock runs.
hub_works_item_planktonight_desc: A browser game about running a club floor. Crowd, night, and sound — one shift at a time.
hub_works_item_noctiluka_desc: A turn-based RPG where a DJ dives into deep-sea minimal techno, beat by glowing beat.
hub_works_item_fractal_drive_desc: A fractal that pulses to the beat. A view from inside Sierpinski geometry, made for floors.
hub_works_item_fractal_beat_desc: A second pass at fractals and beats. A counterpart to Drive, with a different algorithm in search.
hub_works_item_spcc_desc: A Chrome extension that puts time beside your browsing — analog clock and month view, docked.
hub_works_item_sps_desc: A Chrome extension that turns YouTube into pad-playable samples, right inside the side panel.
hub_works_item_speq_desc: A Chrome extension that EQs the audio of any tab. The widest door into the SP series.
hub_works_item_lp_stamps_desc: LINE sticker slot, in preparation. Taking the studio's characters out to another channel.
hub_manifesto_p1: Sounds, visuals, clocks, timers, stickers, extensions. No fixed category — only one rule: it has to tap back when you touch it.
hub_manifesto_p2: TouchDesigner, Max for Live, Strudel, TidalCycles — great tools, but each leaves gaps. We reach into those gaps with the web and Claude Code.
hub_manifesto_p3: One person, many shipments. READMEs written with care. The moment it stops being fun, something is wrong.
hub_about_body: Tipsy Tap Studio is an interactive playground. Sound, visuals, clocks, timers, stamps, browser extensions, gadgets, games — anything you can touch, tweak, or play with. No fixed category. Ideas get built in the order they arrive, shipped with a README, and lined up side by side. The process is logged in the devlog (coming soon).
